canonical_answer: At 4s, a person wearing a grey jacket wipes a white wall with a cloth; at 8s, they turn to pick up a white package from a wooden table; at 12s, the person pulls a rolled poster out of a plastic sleeve; at 14s, they unroll the paper to reveal text; at 18s, the person holds the large white sheet with both hands.

canonical_answer: The paper displays FAMILY RULES with listed rules including Help Each Other, Always Tell the Truth, SHARE, and other family guidelines.
